Notes: Single UPDATE carries two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/class/rdata. The post-update query checks whether the server normalizes duplicate additions into one RR, rejects the message, or exhibits another implementation-specific outcome.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR for dup.campus.edu. twice in a single UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset is present as one RR, absent, or otherwise normalized after the duplicate-add UPDATE.
